appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/user-testing.md Known Quirks to remove stale expectation of intermittent Playwright approval-flow backend `Function ... not found` noise and treat recurrence as regression after fix commit 40cafe75759183a10a5d732320dbfee6fa55cb21.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow assertion-only follow-up features to satisfy validation with explicitly scoped Playwright execution (single spec or --grep) plus rationale, instead of always requiring full-suite runs and artifact-path reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for playwright-artifact-locator-hardening flagged mismatch between SKILL guidance (full npx playwright test + artifact path capture) and follow-up feature contract/verification that intentionally used targeted flow checks.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mandate a repository-wide stable selector contract immediately based on one class-coupled locator finding in playwright-artifact-locator-hardening.
